channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On a essayé la Citroën ë-C3 électrique la moins chère : peut-on compter sur elle au quotidien ?
item.description: La Citroën C3, et sa déclinaison électrique ë-C3 sont un vrai succès pour le constructeur aux chevrons. Après une année 2025 satisafaisante, Citroën lance une version Autonomie Urbaine, si elle sacrifie de l’autonomie et un peu de polyvalence, elle devient l'une des citadines électriques les plus abordables du marché.

item.title: Why stolen credentials continue to work even where MFA is in place
item.description: How stolen credentials and cookies can bypass MFA protections.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch Carabao Cup 2025-26 final for *FREE*
item.description: All the ways to watch free streams of Arsenal vs Man City from anywhere in the world in the Carabao Cup 2025-26 final.

item.title: It’s 2026, and I still can’t believe Apple won’t change the most frustrating thing about iOS
item.description: It’s baffling that, after nearly 20 years of iOS, Apple still won’t let you easily place apps where you want them.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, March 23 (game #1519)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, March 23 (game #1016)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, March 23 (game #750)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Sunbelt housing markets are so weak that this $22B homebuilder is offering its biggest incentives since 2010
item.description: Lennar CEO Stuart Miller: ‘We use margin as a circuit breaker.’ Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: How to watch Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch EFL Cup final for free. Live stream Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final for free.

item.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
item.description: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

item.title: A Long Lost ‘Mystery Science Theater 3000’ Episode Has Finally Been Found
item.description: Thanks to a garage sale, the 'Star Force' episode from the earliest days of 'Mystery Science Theater 3000' is online for all to see.

item.title: Ce smartphone signé Motorola (7 000 mAh) propose deux jours et demi d’autonomie pour à peine 170 €
item.description: Le Motorola Moto G06 Power se démarque avec une batterie de 7 000 mAh pour une autonomie totale dépassant aisément la barre des deux jours. Chez Darty, il perd 16 % de son prix pour devenir encore plus abordable.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for March 22, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
item.description: Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies. Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability […]...

item.title: Voici pourquoi le rêve d’Elon Musk d’établir une « humanité interstellaire » est vain
item.description: Voyager vers une autre étoile que le Soleil relève-t-il encore de la science-fiction ? Ou bien, comme Elon Musk, faut-il préparer l’humanité à l’exode interstellaire ? Qu’en pensent les astrophysiciens ? Quelles quantités d’énergie faudrait-il mobiliser ? Comment abolir les distances physiques...

item.title: Turtle Beach’s Donkey Kong-themed Nintendo Switch 2 case is the best I’ve tested so far, with impressive durability and storage at a tempting low price
item.description: This hard-shell case from Turtle Beach is easily one of the best I’ve tried so far — and its stand-out design is a big reason for that.

item.title: The Madison season 2: everything we know so far about the Taylor Sheridan spinoff's return
item.description: Thankfully, The Madison season 2 was renewed before season 1 was even released on Paramount+. Here's the latest on the Taylor Sheridan spinoff's return.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Power Duo Immersion Blender — a quick and effective tool that can tackle just about any ingredient
item.description: A simple, space-saving appliance that can tackle just about any ingredient you can throw at it.

item.title: The secret story of the vocoder, the military tech that changed music forever
item.description: The vocoder was never supposed to be a revolution in music. It wasn't supposed to be anything in music, really. Its development began a century ago, when an engineer at Bell Labs was looking for a simpler way to send phone calls across copper telephone lines. The engineer, Homer Dudley, built some pretty neat technology […]
